entries.title: Lead enrichment sidebar for LinkedIn Recruiter
entries.notes: Sidebar overlays enriched contact data on LinkedIn Recruiter profiles.
entries.pain: Recruiters context-switch between LinkedIn and 3 enrichment tools.

entries.title: Local-first browser notepad with markdown sync
entries.notes: Stores notes in IndexedDB; optional GitHub gist sync.
entries.pain: Note apps force signups or lose your data when subscriptions lapse.

entries.title: GitHub PR review checklist enforcer
entries.notes: Adds a per-repo checklist overlay to the GitHub PR review page.
entries.pain: Teams forget review steps; checklists live in Notion nobody opens.
